name: Kyligence
description: Enterprise OLAP platform built on Apache Kylin with AI-augmented analytics (Copilot) and cloud deployment.

seo.title: Kyligence — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Kyligence: Enterprise OLAP platform built on Apache Kylin with AI-augmented analytics (Copilot) and cloud deployment.

when_to_use: Enterprise OLAP on Kylin with AI-augmented analytics assistant
Cloud deployment of Apache Kylin cubes with Kyligence Cloud
Sub-second queries on multi-billion row data with OLAP cubes
Semantic metrics layer for consistent BI across the org
AI Copilot for ad hoc querying on pre-built analytical models

pros: Enterprise-grade OLAP built on Apache Kylin
cons: Cube maintenance overhead inherited from Kylin
review.verdict: Polished commercial Kylin with AI add-ons, still up against Snowflake and Databricks for enterprise analytics mindshare.
review.best_for: Banks and telcos running existing Kylin cubes wanting enterprise support and AI features
review.not_for: Greenfield analytics stacks where lakehouse architectures fit better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
